recommendations.title: The Long Walk
recommendations.overview: In a dystopian 1970s America, fifty teenage boys take part in a deadly annual walking contest, forced to maintain a minimum pace or be executed, until only one survivor remains.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
recommendations.overview: 64 years before he becomes the tyrannical president of Panem, Coriolanus Snow sees a chance for a change in fortunes when he mentors Lucy Gray Baird, the female tribute from District 12.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
recommendations.overview: After surviving the Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta struggle with the consequences of their victory as unrest spreads across Panem. Forced back into the spotlight, they become symbols of hope and resistance while the Capitol prepares a new and deadly

recommendations.title: Slumberland
recommendations.overview: A young girl discovers a secret map to the dreamworld of Slumberland, and with the help of an eccentric outlaw, she traverses dreams and flees nightmares, with the hope that she will be able to see her late father again.

recommendations.title: Constantine

recommendations.title: Water for Elephants
recommendations.overview: In this captivating Depression-era melodrama, impetuous veterinary student Jacob Jankowski joins a celebrated circus as an animal caretaker but faces a wrenching dilemma when he's transfixed by angelic married performer Marlena.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2

recommendations.title: Replicas
recommendations.overview: A scientist becomes obsessed with returning his family to normalcy after a terrible accident.
